rulings.Case Title: JAMES A HENNEFER VS. MARGARET A. SELTZER INDIVIDUALLY & D/B/A THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Distribution Of Levy Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 3, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF JAMES HENNEFER's Motion For Order Of Distribution Of Levy Proceeds This motion should be brought in Sonoma County, where Seltzer is the judgment creditor and where the levied upon liens have been filed. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK VS. RANDALL B. ALLISON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 3, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT RANDALL ALLISON and YOLANDA ALLISON's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery GRANTED. Plaintiff does not cite any authority barring Plaintiff from seeking follow up discovery related to assertions and representations made by Plaintiff in this case. See Plaintiff's response to Special Interrogatory, Set One #3 and Nagamatsu declaration. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant shall provide responses to Special Interrogatories 13, 14, 15 and Request for Production 17, 18, 19 within 5 day of notice of entry of order by personal delivery no later than March 10, 2014 by 5 p.m. Plaintiff's Motion for summary judgment is continued to March 18, 2014. Defendant's supplemental opposition, if any, addressing issues related to new discovery only, shall be filed no later than March 13, 2014. Plaintiff's reply, if any, shall be filed no later than March 17, 2014 by 9 a.m. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons & Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 3, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT LINDA WILSON's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons & Amended Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach the HUD addendum which was a part of Defendant's lease. Defendant was personally served on February 19, 2014. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL P. SWEENEY VS. CARLA CLYNES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 3, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT CARLA CLYNES and ESTHER HERNANDEZ's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED, 5 days to respond. Proof of Service by registered process server on file. No declaration by Esther Hernandez. = (501/AJR)
